description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on every push to main, on pull requests, and when a repository is created. Use a matrix job strategy to test across multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12) and operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, build the project, and run tests in both C extension and pure Python fallback environments.
